title: Manufacturing Engineer - Blue Star India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Blue Star India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!
